nl_query: Which evaluation policies are currently effective for boards that have at least one script with a pending revaluation request, and show the policy scope, deviation threshold, and review requirement.
failed_sql: SELECT ep.id, ep.board_id, ep.course_id, ep.deviation_threshold, ep.review_required, ep.third_eval_trigger FROM evaluation_policy ep JOIN revaluation_request rr ON rr.board_id = ep.board_id WHERE rr.approval_status = 'PENDING' GROUP BY ep.id, ep.board_id, ep.course_id, ep.deviation_threshold, ep.review_required, ep.third_eval_trigger
error: Validation failed (schema): Column validation failed: revaluation_request does NOT have board_id. Join via answer_script and board.
